summary: P1 Audit/Permissions UX Expansion - Backend and Frontend Testing Complete

critical.issue: Route conflict - /api/admin/audit-logs/{log_id} is defined BEFORE /api/admin/audit-logs/export, causing FastAPI to match 'export' as log_id and return 400 'Invalid audit log id'
critical.fix: Move /api/admin/audit-logs/export route definition BEFORE /api/admin/audit-logs/{log_id} in server.py

minor.issue: Pagination overlap detected when new audit events are continuously inserted during test (total changed from 100000 to 100013). This is expected behavior with high-write datasets but worth noting for documentation.

issues: React hydration warnings in console: <span> cannot be child of <option>, <select>, <tbody>. These are cosmetic warnings from the Visual Editor wrapper and don't affect functionality.

action_items: Fix audit-logs/export route ordering - move /api/admin/audit-logs/export BEFORE /api/admin/audit-logs/{log_id} in server.py (line ~13310 should come before line ~13293)
critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering issue in FastAPI: Static routes like /export must be defined BEFORE dynamic routes like /{log_id}
Pagination implementation is correct with proper page/size/q/sort standardization
403 guards properly enforced for user/dealer unauthorized access to admin audit/permissions APIs
CSV export correctly restricted to super_admin only on permissions overrides

success_rate.backend: 96% (48/50 passed, 2 failed due to route conflict and expected pagination behavior)

seed_data_creation: Used existing 100k audit seed data for performance testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Audit/Permissions UX testing complete. Backend pagination params standardized (page/size/q/sort). All filters working: actor, role, country, event_type, date_from, date_to for audit; q, actor, role, country_scope for permissions. One route ordering bug found for /audit-logs/export. Frontend UI verified with all filters, pagination controls, shadow-diff badge, explicit override list, and permission matrix working correctly.

audit_dashboard.pagination_controls: PASS (page size, prev, next, page meta)

permissions_page.explicit_override_list: PASS (38 overrides, pagination, Export CSV button)
permissions_page.user_permission_matrix: PASS (user dropdown, Domain/Action/Inherit/Explicit/Effective columns, Grant/Revoke buttons)

100k_pagination_stability.note: Pagination stable within single query, but overlap detected when new events inserted between page requests (expected for high-write datasets)
